## Load longitudinal seroresponse parameter samples {.unnumbered}


### Description

Load longitudinal seroresponse parameter samples



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>load_sr_params(file_path, antigen_isos = NULL)
</code></pre>


### Arguments

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="file_path">file_path</code></td>
<td>
path to an RDS file containing MCMC samples of antibody
seroresponse parameters <code>y0</code>, <code>y1</code>, <code>t1</code>, <code>alpha</code>, and <code>r</code>,
stored as a <code>data.frame()</code> or tibble::tbl_df
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="antigen_isos">antigen_isos</code></td>
<td>
<code>character()</code> vector of antigen isotypes used in analyses
</td></tr>
</table>


### Value

a <code>curve_params</code> object (a tibble::tbl_df
with extra attribute <code>antigen_isos</code>)



### Examples
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library("serocalculator")

curve <- load_sr_params(serocalculator_example("example_curve_params.rds"))

print(curve)



```
